calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAMUEL STONE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Samuel Stone's unopposed motion to quash service of summons and complaint is granted. Order signed. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

MOTION Notice Of Motion & Motion To Disqualify Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
SAMUEL H. STONE self-represented defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing was held. A untimely Notice of Contest was received from defendant. The matter discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument,the Court vacates its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT SAMUEL STONE MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is off calendar. The Notice of Motion and Motion to Disqualify Counsel is also off calendar per the request of the defendant/moving party is granted.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
